recommendations.title: Bats
recommendations.overview: Genetically mutated bats escape and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

recommendations.title: Retroactive
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Action, Crime, Drama, Adventure
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist makes multiple trips through time to save a woman that was murdered by her brutal husband.

recommendations.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
recommendations.overview: A sadistic serial killer terrorizes a couple driving on a rural highway in Texas while killing numerous people and framing them for his killings.

recommendations.title: Joy Ride 2: Dead Ahead

recommendations.title: The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari

recommendations.title: The Golem: How He Came Into the World
recommendations.overview: In 16th-century Prague, a rabbi creates the Golem - a giant creature made of clay. Using sorcery, he brings the creature to life in order to protect the Jews of Prague from persecution.

recommendations.title: You Won't Be Alone

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: Kill, Baby... Kill!
recommendations.overview: A 20th century European village is haunted by the ghost of a murderous little girl.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: The Wolf Man tries to warn a dimwitted porter that Dracula wants his brain for Frankenstein monster's body.
